Journal.Title: Journal of renal nutrition : the official journal of the Council on Renal Nutrition of the National Kidney Foundation

Article.ArticleTitle: Response to Letter to the Editor: 'The Role of Smoking in Dietary and Potassium Balance Among Hemodialysis Patients'.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Dutch Association of Nephrology Dietitians, Utrecht, The Netherlands; Division of Dietetics, Department of Internal Medicine, Erasmus MC, University Medical Center, Rotterdam, The Netherlands; Center of Expertise Urban Vitality, Faculty of Sports and Nutrition, Amsterdam University of Applied Sciences, Amsterdam, The Netherlands.
